rules.headings: Tight tracking (tracking-tight), never center-aligned for dashboards, high contrast.
rules.data_labels: Uppercase, mono-spaced, tracking-[0.1em], tiny (text-xs). Use for status badges and chart axis.

layout.spacing_scale: Dense and compact spacing (gap-4, p-4, p-6). Every pixel utilized.
layout.card_style: Flat Solid Surfaces. Subtle border (border-slate-800). Max 8px border-radius. No heavy shadows, use inner 1px border highlights to ground elements.

components.upload_zone: Dashed border (border-slate-700), bg-slate-900/50, hover:bg-slate-900. Smooth transitions. Use a strong clinical icon.
components.processing_overlay: Quantum-themed overlay. Use monospaced terminal font (JetBrains Mono) for staging labels. Pulsing teal/violet SVG circuit lines. Absolute positioned over the image preview.
components.bar_chart: Horizontal orientation. Minimal axis lines. Highlight the predicted class with brand.primary. Unselected classes in muted slate.
components.gauge_meter: Circular SVG gauge for confidence. Stroke color dynamically changes: Green > 90%, Teal 75-90%, Violet 60-75%, Orange < 60%.
components.warning_badge: Triggers if confidence < 60%. Style: bg-orange-950, text-orange-400, border-orange-900, uppercase mono-spaced.
components.history_table: Dense Shadcn table. Hover states on rows (hover:bg-slate-800/50). Small 40x40px rounded thumbnails for past MRI scans.

motion.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-[1px]) for action buttons, fast opacity transitions.
motion.loading: Pulse animations on the circuit diagram. Staggered text reveal for processing stages (Extracting -> Encoding -> Computing -> Aggregating).
motion.charts: Animate width/stroke-dasharray over 1-2 seconds on load to simulate computation completion.

assets.icons: lucide-react (default for standard UI) or @phosphor-icons/react for clinical precision.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for text. Avoid pure black backgrounds to prevent eye strain during long clinical shifts.
accessibility.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='upload-analyze-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React (.js/.jsx) as requested. Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx) files.
Use Shadcn UI extensively but heavily override default styles to match the dark midnight-navy theme and 'Control Room' flat-solid aesthetics.
Do NOT use the 'Inter' font anywhere. Configure Tailwind to use Manrope for sans, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for mono.
Implement the Processing State as an engaging, mono-spaced terminal output + pulsing circuit, mimicking a real QSVM execution timeline. Include a timer counting up.
Use Recharts for the Probability Distribution bar chart and Model Insights charts. Keep chart grids minimal (border-slate-800).
For the History Log, map the provided MRI thumbnails.
Apply `data-testid` to all buttons, upload zones, chart containers, confidence meters, and warning badges.
Ensure 'Low confidence — radiologist review recommended' badge appears conditionally when prediction confidence is below 60%.
